name: sync mechanism honors per-source token budget and skips sources whose budget is exhausted
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus && printf '{"a":{"used_today":100000}}
' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/budget.json && printf 'sources: [{id: a, source_class: financial-industry, tier: 1, applies_to: [node]}]
operator_namespace: []
' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/sync-from-sources.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml --budget .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/budget.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'a status=skip-budget' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
